name: Crustless"frugal" Quiche; Calorie Reduced Ve
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F.
Slice onion into 1/4-inch wedges and sauté in a skillet sprayed with a release agent. Remove from heat and let cool. Melt margarine; allow to cool.
Cut jack cheese into 1/8- to 1/4-inch cubes. Beat eggs in a large bowl of a mixer. Add flour, baking powder, salt, cottage cheese, butter, and jack cheese until well combined. Stir in onions.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 15 minutes at 400°F. Reduce heat to 350°F and cook for another 30 minutes.
Each serving is equivalent to the following Weight Watchers Personal Choice program exchanges: 1 egg, 1/2 hard cheese, 1 cottage cheese, 1/4 bread, 1 1/2 fat, 1/4 vegetable, 15 optional calories.
